bio: She is a black wolf with pink markings on her stomach area. The silver fur on her legs area are quite longer and looks like boots. Depending on the viewer's perception, sometimes they will have hard time to see Noira at all at a certain sound level. Or they would see Noira as someone else altogether, like an illusion. Even if she always listens to Tharos, she wouldn't afraid to sway the team using her opinions.
personalityFlaws: her tendency to not listen to Tharos' orders sometimes result in an unexpected outcome
personalityQuirks: full trust to Tharos when she couldn't decide anything by herself
bodyShapeDescription:
a black wolf with pink markings on her stomach and silver markings on her legs that looks like boots. She has silver eyes, but it will glow pink whenever she uses sound-based moves. Above her head there is a tuft of fur that looks like hair, shaped like a moon crescent.

At a certain sound level, the viewer might have hard time looking at Noira as she would look like a blur or not even visible at all. Sometimes it might make the viewer to perceive her as someone else altogether. While standing still, she seems to have a pinkish aura around her neck, which looks like a flower necklace.
